headline: Goldman Sachs Sees Opportunity in PNC After Recent Bank Selloff
summary: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE:PNC) is included among the 13 Bank Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 6, Goldman Sachs raised its price recommendation on The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE:PNC) to $220 from $215. It maintained a Neutral rating on the shares. The update came as part of a broader note […]
